data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a configurable stage model with stage transition history. However, the evidence provided does not include any information or data regarding the existence of a stage model or its transition history, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage. The linked use case mentions the need for a stage model, but no evidence supports its implementation or functionality.
gaps: No evidence of a configurable stage model or stage transition history.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
